Document:
# Administrative Assistant (AA) SOP This is the list of procedures, responsibilities, and duties of the [color=#1b67a5][bold]Administrative Assistant[/bold][/color] of this station.
1. Administrative Assistants must carry out any request from any head of staff. (Provided the requests don't violate SOP or Space Law.)
2. The AA is not obligated to run errands for the NanoTrasen Representative.
3. AAs are allowed to carry telescopic batons and flashes.
4. The AA should not act as a Security Officer.
5. The bridge must stay clean under the AA's watch.
6. The AA is not permitted to distribute the NanoTrasen Approved Premium Coffee to any non command personnel under any circumstance. Administrative Assistants can drink the coffee as long as it helps them do their duties.
7. Command personnel can not be allowed more than one cup of NanoTrasen Approved Premium Coffee at a time.
8. As the AA, you are not permitted to ask for a raise.
